title: Jen'ari
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Jen'ari''''' was the word in the [[Sith (language)|Sith]] for "Dark Lord." It was originally used to delineate the [[Exiles]] who survived the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]]. Thus, it gave rise to the title of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]].
